children.name: This stunning lakeside modern villa offers panoramic views of Lake Washington with floor-to-ceiling windows throughout. The open-concept living space features a chef's kitchen with premium appliances, a spacious master suite with a private balcony, and a landscaped backyard perfect for entertaining. Smart home technology and energy-efficient systems throughout.
children.characters: This stunning lakeside modern villa offers panoramic views of Lake Washington with floor-to-ceiling windows throughout. The open-concept living space features a chef's kitchen with premium appliances, a spacious master suite with a private balcony, and a landscaped backyard perfect for entertaining. Smart home technology and energy-efficient systems throughout.
